note: Eval runner not yet implemented. These test cases define expected behavior for manual verification and future automation.

test_cases.prompt: Email me a summary of what we discussed about the [your-app] migration
expected_behavior: Uses build-digest-email.sh piped into jules-send-email.sh (HTML path)
Subject line is specific (mentions [your-app] migration, not generic 'Update')
Content is formatted as markdown with headers and structure

test_cases.prompt: Email me a reminder to follow up with Michael from AITX this week
expected_behavior: Uses jules-send-email.sh with --body flag (plain text path)
Does NOT use build-digest-email.sh for a one-liner
Subject line is descriptive (e.g. 'Reminder: Follow Up with Michael')

test_cases.prompt: What would the email look like if I asked you to send me today's session notes?
expected_behavior: Uses --dry-run flag to preview without sending
Shows recipient, from address, subject, and send count
Does NOT consume a send from the daily limit
